issue_body_preview:
This PR fixes a bug where lines with only one point were causing arrays with NaN values.

https://github.com/steveruizok/perfect-freehand/issues/19

If the library detects a line with only one point, it pushes a second point onto the line with a tiny offset. The bug here was that we were failing
test_description_zh: 在画布上仅点击一次（不拖动）绘制一个由单个点组成的线条，观察渲染结果是否正常显示为一个小圆点。
expected_result_zh: 单点线条应正常渲染为一个小圆点，不应出现空白、渲染异常或控制台报错（不应产生 NaN 值导致的绘制失败）。
